betOfDay.analysis: Timberwolves fighting for playoff positioning in competitive West. Home court advantage significant. Blazers rebuilding. Line reasonable at -2.5.

picks.game: Minnesota Timberwolves vs Portland Trail Blazers
picks.reasoning: Wolves need wins for playoff seeding. Home crowd should help. Blazers clearly rebuilding.
Nuggets at home where they're dominant. Raptors on road struggling. Jokic makes the difference.
Rockets have been one of the hottest teams. Young core playing well. Hawks inconsistent on road.

research.nba: 7 NBA games today (March 20). Notable lines: Knicks -17 at Nets (too high), Celtics -15 at Grizzlies (avoid), Warriors +5 at Pistons (interesting dog). Best values: Wolves -2.5, Nuggets -7, Rockets -3.5.
